design_philosophy: Kid-friendly Duolingo style. Bright, large touch targets, highly tactile elements mimicking paper folding. Emphasize progression and reward. Focus on 'Thumb-friendly' layout and bottom-sheet navigation for ease of use.

buttons.primary: bg-[#38BDF8] text-white border-b-4 border-[#0284C7] rounded-full px-8 py-4 text-lg font-bold active:border-b-0 active:mt-1
buttons.secondary: bg-[#FDE047] text-[#1E293B] border-b-4 border-[#FACC15] rounded-full px-8 py-4 text-lg font-bold active:border-b-0 active:mt-1

cards.default: bg-white border-2 border-[#E2E8F0] border-b-4 rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-sm
cards.premium: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#FDE047] to-[#FEF08A] border-2 border-[#FACC15] border-b-4 rounded-3xl p-6

navigation.bottom_tab: fixed bottom-0 w-full bg-white border-t-2 border-[#E2E8F0] pb-safe pt-2 px-6 flex justify-between items-center rounded-t-3xl

components.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g. data-testid="start-learning-button").

images.description: Two colorful origami bears facing each other, establishing a friendly, tactile connection.
Five assorted-color elephant origamis, ideal for showing 'Intermediate' or 'Advanced' levels.
Pink origami in front of other color origamis. Vibrant and cheerful.
PayPal logo for premium video checkout flow.
Apple Pay logo for premium video checkout flow.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Use the Duolingo gamification strategy: chunky 3D-like buttons (using bottom borders to simulate depth), large rounded cards, and highly visible progress bars.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Fonts are critical. Use Fredoka for headings to maintain the youthful, friendly vibe, and Nunito for all body text.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Always apply generous padding (p-6 or p-8) around the main content so kids don't misclick.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: The app structure must have a bottom tab bar containing Home, Browse, Seasonal, Profile.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Incorporate the image URLs provided in the media section to avoid any placeholder graphics. Use the colorful origami images for category headers and seasonal features.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Ensure contrast ratios are met for text over colored backgrounds. The #1E293B text color is preferred over stark black.
instructions_to_main_agent.7: Do NOT use standard boring input fields. Gamify the onboarding flow (e.g. 'What's your skill level?' using massive tap-able cards with icons).
instructions_to_main_agent.8: For the Premium Video paywall, clearly present the 1-month trial and display the provided PayPal and Apple Pay logos using standard image components.
instructions_to_main_agent.9: Every clickable/interactive element MUST have a 'data-testid' prop for testing.
